faqs.question: What does tick control service include in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of yards, shrubs, grass edges, and wooded areas where ticks hide. We apply professional-grade products to eliminate adult ticks, nymphs, and larvae, with special attention to common tick habitats around your South Ozone Park property. Follow-up treatments are available for ongoing protection.

faqs.question: When is tick season in South Ozone Park, Queens?
faqs.answer: Tick activity in South Ozone Park typically peaks from April through October, with deer ticks remaining active even during mild winters. The highest risk periods are late spring and early fall. We recommend preventative treatments in early spring before tick populations explode and maintenance treatments throughout the active season for maximum protection.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in South Ozone Park range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. Single treatments for average yards start at $125, while larger properties or seasonal packages range up to $325. We provide free estimates and can customize a treatment plan that fits your budget and needs.

faqs.question: Is tick treatment safe for children and pets in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and until the treatment dries (typically 2-4 hours). Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions for your South Ozone Park property to ensure complete protection without risk.
